title: Setup Python Environment and Dependencies
description: Create virtual environment and install all required packages for CAG-HNM experiments

steps.step3: Install PyTorch 2.1+ with CUDA 12.1: pip install torch torchvision torchaudio --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu121
steps.step4: Install additional packages: pip install numpy scipy scikit-learn matplotlib seaborn pandas pillow tqdm tensorboard
steps.step5: Verify GPU availability: python -c 'import torch; print(f"CUDA available: {torch.cuda.is_available()}, GPU: {torch.cuda.get_device_name(0)}")'
steps.step6: Create project directory structure: mkdir -p src data results logs checkpoints figures

title: Download and Prepare CIFAR-100
description: Download CIFAR-100 dataset and create derived coarse-label attributes

steps.step2: Extract 20 coarse labels as binary attributes: create matrix A_cifar of shape (100, 20)
steps.step3: Pre-compute Jaccard similarity matrix S_cifar of shape (100, 100)

title: Download and Prepare CUB-200-2011
description: Download CUB-200-2011 with 312 binary attributes for fine-grained bird recognition

steps.step2: Extract class attributes and binarize continuous values
steps.step3: Pre-compute Jaccard similarity matrix S_cub of shape (200, 200)

title: Cross-Entropy Baseline on CIFAR-100
description: Train standard cross-entropy baseline - SIMPLE BASELINE

steps.step2: Optimizer: SGD momentum=0.9, weight_decay=5e-4, lr=0.1 cosine annealing

title: SupCon Baseline on CIFAR-100
description: Train standard supervised contrastive learning - MAIN BASELINE

steps.step1: Model: ResNet-18 encoder + 2-layer MLP projection head (dim=128)
steps.step2: Loss: SupCon loss with temperature τ=0.1
steps.step3: Two-stage: 100 epochs contrastive + 50 epochs linear eval

title: JD-CCL-style Fixed Selection on CIFAR-100
description: Reimplement JD-CCL fixed selection - ADDRESSES NOVELTY CONCERN

steps.step1: Select top-25% hardest negatives per anchor based on Jaccard similarity
steps.step2: Fixed throughout training: w_n = exp(2.0 * s_attr)
steps.step3: Same ResNet-18 + projection head as SupCon

title: CAG-HNM on CIFAR-100
description: Our proposed Curriculum Attribute-Guided Hard Negative Mining - MAIN METHOD

steps.step1: w_n(t) = exp(λ(t) * s_attr) where λ(t) = 0.1 + 1.9 * t^2.0
steps.step5: Run with 3 seeds: [42, 123, 456] for statistical significance
steps.step7: Track curriculum parameter λ(t) per epoch

title: SupCon Baseline on CUB-200
description: Train SupCon on CUB-200 fine-grained - MAIN BASELINE

steps.step1: Model: ResNet-50 pretrained on ImageNet + projection head
steps.step3: Training: 50 epochs contrastive + 50 epochs linear eval

title: JD-CCL-style Fixed Selection on CUB-200
description: JD-CCL fixed on CUB-200 - NOVELTY COMPARISON ON FINE-GRAINED

steps.step1: Use 312 bird attributes for Jaccard similarity
steps.step2: Select top-30% hardest negatives, fixed weighting w_n = exp(2.0 * s_attr)

title: CAG-HNM on CUB-200
description: Our CAG-HNM on fine-grained CUB-200 - MAIN METHOD ON FINE-GRAINED

steps.step1: Use 312 bird attributes, curriculum λ(t) = 0.1 + 1.9 * t^2.0
steps.step5: Run with 2 seeds: [42, 123] (use CIFAR-100 for 3-seed significance)
steps.step7: Record training curves for stability analysis

title: CRITICAL ABLATION: Fixed vs Curriculum Weighting
description: Direct comparison showing curriculum beats fixed - ADDRESSES NOVELTY CONCERN

steps.step1: Fixed (JD-CCL-style): w = exp(2.0 * s_attr) constant - 1 seed, CIFAR-100
steps.step2: Fixed-aggressive: w = exp(4.0 * s_attr) constant - 1 seed
steps.step4: All: 100 epochs contrastive + 50 epochs eval on CIFAR-100

title: Ablation: Effect of Curriculum Schedule
description: Test γ=0 (fixed) vs γ=2.0 (curriculum) to validate curriculum benefit - USE DATA FROM FIXED VS CURRICULUM ABLATION

steps.step1: Use Fixed (JD-CCL-style) result from ablation above as γ=0 (no curriculum)
steps.step2: Use Curriculum result from ablation above as γ=2.0
steps.step3: Compare to validate curriculum benefit without additional training

title: Statistical Significance and Success Criteria
description: Statistical tests and success criteria verification

steps.step2: Paired t-test: CAG-HNM vs SupCon on each dataset (3 seeds vs 2 seeds)
steps.step3: Paired t-test: CAG-HNM vs JD-CCL-style on each dataset
steps.step6: CRITERION 2: Outperform JD-CCL-style by ≥1.5% on CUB-200
steps.step8: NOVELTY CHECK: Document differentiation from JD-CCL

title: Generate Paper Figures
description: Create figures for the research paper

steps.step1: Figure 1: Main results table - Top-1 accuracy comparison
steps.step2: Figure 2: Training curves - CAG-HNM vs baselines on CUB-200
steps.step3: Figure 3: Ablation bar chart - Fixed vs Curriculum weighting
steps.step4: Figure 4: Curriculum progression plot over epochs
steps.step6: Save to ./figures/ in PNG and PDF formats
